top_signals.title: Former SNP chief admits embezzling £400K of party funds to ‘bankroll lavish lifestyle’
top_signals.summary: The former chief executive of the Scottish National Party, Peter Murrell, who is also Nicola Sturgeon’s estranged husband, has been remanded in custody after pleading guilty to embezzling hundreds of thousands of pounds from the party.  Murrell pleaded guilty on Monday morning when he appeared at the High Court in Edinburgh.  Murrell admitted using “false [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
